body: Vector rotation was not defined for immersed boundary grids. This PR defines it.
title: (0.94.3) Vector rotation for immersed boundary grids

body:
Resolves #3948

`Azᶜᶜᵃ` was defined in the `Operators` module, just not exported, so it couldn't be used in `AbstractOperations`. I'll export some more common metrics.

But now the MWE from #3948 is giving me another error (see below).

Looks like `reduced_dimensions` is not defined for `BinaryOperation`, just `Field`. I'll change the definitions to use `AbstractField` as `AbstractOperation <: AbstractField`.

```
ERROR: MethodError: no method matching reduced_dimensions(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.BinaryOperation{Center, Center, Nothing, typeof(*), Field{…}, Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.GridMetricOperation{…}, typeof(Oceananigans.Operators.identity1), typeof(Oceananigans.Operators.identity2), ImmersedBoundaryGrid{…}, Float64})

Closest candidates are:
  reduced_dimensions(::Field{Nothing, Nothing, Nothing})
   @ Oceananigans ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/Fields/field.jl:523
  reduced_dimensions(::Field{Nothing, Nothing})
   @ Oceananigans ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/Fields/field.jl:522
  reduced_dimensions(::Field{Nothing, <:Any, Nothing})
   @ Oceananigans ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/Fields/field.jl:521
  ...

Stacktrace:
 [1] immersed_column
   @ ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/ImmersedBoundaries/immersed_reductions.jl:71 [inlined]
 [2] condition_operand(func::typeof(identity), op::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.BinaryOperation{…}, ::Nothing, mask::Int64)
   @ Oceananigans.ImmersedBoundaries ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/ImmersedBoundaries/immersed_reductions.jl:67
 [3] condition_operand
   @ ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/Fields/field.jl:649 [inlined]
 [4] (Reduction{…})(field::Field{…}; dims::Tuple{…}, condition::Nothing, mask::Int64)
   @ Oceananigans.AbstractOperations ~/atdepth/Oceananigans.jl/src/AbstractOperations/metric_field_reductions.jl:111
 [5] top-level scope
   @ REPL[11]:1
Some type information was truncated. Use `show(err)` to see complete types.
```
title: Fix `Integral` reductions on immersed grids
